title: Infinity Soup
description: A soup that never runs out. You will love it.
body:
Tired of farming food every day?

If so this Data Pack is the solution for you!
Scientists found a mixture of the most saturating ingredients that will last forever.
You will never ever have to gather food anymore.

*(Side effect may be a short night vision and extreme luck.)*

**Recipe is in gallery**

If you find any bugs please report them here ==> [Bug Report﻿](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScT5R8IVlWU_ueSXchdSMkPnv_SI8Z_f0Aezz_RM_4S0O0ZDA/viewform)
